visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, located in the center.
An orange plastic bottle to the left of the red soda can.
A white soda can to the right of the red soda can.
A clear plastic water bottle behind the red and white soda cans.
A green soda can partially visible behind the red soda can.
A black soda can partially visible behind the orange plastic bottle.

action_plan.explanation: The user wants to drink coca cola, and the red soda can is directly accessible in the front.
